name: Deep Climbing Gym Harbor Pattaya
addressFull: 8th Floor, Harbor Pattaya Shopping Mall, 190/25 Moo 9, Central Pattaya Road, Nongprue, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150

classes.schedule: No current schedule: the location is listed as permanently closed.
classes.levels: Historically served first-time and experienced climbers.

history.ownership: Opened inside Harbor Pattaya as part of the Harborland group venue mix.
history.notableEvents: Pattaya Mail reported a large 800-square-metre opening project developed with the Sport Climbing Association of Thailand. Google now marks the Pattaya location permanently closed; the exact closure date was not published.

audience.whoShouldSkip: Everyone planning a visit: the current Google location listing says permanently closed.

praise: Historical reviews describe an air-conditioned activity suitable for families and mixed ages.
A May 2025 review described friendly staff and a working climbing session before the later closure flag.
complaints: Reviews describe a small bouldering section and unclear route grading.
Some visitors report weak safety briefing or limited staff belay support.
Older reviews criticize price-to-value and inconsistent English-language service.

comparison.differentiator: Historically Pattaya's central mall-based air-conditioned climbing wall; it is not a current option because the location is marked permanently closed.

sources.label: Google Maps location listing and reviews
Wanderlog location profile and review timeline

unverified: whether equipment or staff moved to another venue
